problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: If mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression is applied to epigenetically, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
